'''rajoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obacunone|obacunone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obacunone|obacunone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rajoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjeseth|ræjeseth]] || [[word:ræjesej|ræjesej]] || [[word:ræjesesh|ræjesesh]] || [[word:ræjese|ræjese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajojosoth|rajojosoth]] || [[word:rajojosoj|rajojosoj]] || [[word:rajojososh|rajojososh]] || [[word:rajojoso|rajojoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajosoth|rajosoth]] || [[word:rajosoj|rajosoj]] || [[word:rajososh|rajososh]] || [[word:rajoso|rajoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajofsofth|rajofsofth]] || [[word:rajofsofj|rajofsofj]] || [[word:rajofsofsh|rajofsofsh]] || [[word:rajofsof|rajofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajosotho|rajosotho]] || [[word:rajosojo|rajosojo]] || [[word:rajososho|rajososho]] || [[word:rajosoko|rajosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajosoth|rajosoth]] || [[word:rajosoj|rajosoj]] || [[word:rajososh|rajososh]] || [[word:rajoso|rajoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajosothol|rajosothol]] || [[word:rajosojol|rajosojol]] || [[word:rajososhol|rajososhol]] || [[word:rajosokol|rajosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajosoothotho|rajosoothotho]] || [[word:rajosoojojo|rajosoojojo]] || [[word:rajosooshosho|rajosooshosho]] || [[word:rajosooko|rajosooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajosothon|rajosothon]] || [[word:rajosojon|rajosojon]] || [[word:rajososhon|rajososhon]] || [[word:rajosokon|rajosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajosothooro|rajosothooro]] || [[word:rajosojooro|rajosojooro]] || [[word:rajososhooro|rajososhooro]] || [[word:rajosokooro|rajosokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
